commands.notes: Repo-wide scan reports pre-existing issues in other workpacks. Target workpack outputs validate correctly.

verification.regression_notes: Added unit tests for output JSON existence for complete prompts (AC6), schema conformance validation, and declared file existence checks (AC7).

handoff.summary: Implemented output artifact checker: validates outputs/*.json existence for every complete prompt, validates each against WORKPACK_OUTPUT_SCHEMA.json, and verifies files declared in changes.files_created and changes.files_modified exist on disk. Backfilled output during V1 remediation.
next_steps: Wire into unified verify command via A7
known_issues: Repo-wide scan reports pre-existing declared-file-missing errors in other workpacks outside this prompt scope.
